Current gates: OpenAPI, lint, typecheck, 235 unit, 133 integration, isolated full-source webpack build, disposable migrations/database checks.
Management, grocery, recipe/planner, cooking, and integrated E2Es cover desktop/tablet/mobile, keyboard, axe, screenshots, persistence, containment, and strict browser errors.
